sources.label: Yahoo Finance - CR quote and news
StockTitan - Crane closes $1.06B PSI acquisition (8-K, pre-June 6)
Investing.com - Stifel upgrades Crane to Buy, $215 PT (acquisition integration, not AI-specific)

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's down move already penalized the adjusted-score gap; no AI-chain-relevant news since June 6 and today's +2.65% is sub-threshold industrial drift, so hold at 74 with minor negative drift for price creep without new latent-node evidence.
verdicts.bull: Strong M&A execution (Druck, Panametrics/PSI, Reuter-Stokes) is building a high-reliability sensing and fluid-control portfolio that could plausibly win thermal-management and precision-flow niches in AI datacenter and power infrastructure.
verdicts.neutral: Q1 2026 beat and raised guidance ($6.65-$6.85 EPS) reflect aerospace and acquisition strength, but none of it is AI-chain specific; the latent-node thesis remains speculative cross-pollination with no design wins disclosed.
verdicts.bear: Process Flow Technologies faces organic headwinds, leverage from $1.36B of acquisitions raises interest costs, and if the AI-cooling crossover never materializes this is just a fairly valued diversified industrial with no residual alpha on this screen.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: A disclosed datacenter cooling/flow-control design win or AI-infrastructure order leveraging the Panametrics/Druck sensing portfolio.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Thesis remains hypothetical cross-pollination; integration strain or industrial-cycle softness erodes the score before any AI-chain evidence appears.
